commands.review_summary:
The PR registers `google-vertex` for Google image/video generation and adds Vertex-specific image/video REST routing, headers, response parsing, and contract tests.

PR surface: Source +199, Tests +17. Total +216 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main registers only `google` for image/video generation, so a `google-vertex/...` media request cannot resolve a matching provider and follows the reported missing-provider path.
